 "cells": [
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "29923753",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "# Transcribe\n",
    "\n",
    "\n",
    "*(Note: We are using a copyright-free synthetic track for this demonstration).*\n",
    "\n",
    "<!--date_created:sat-16-may-2026-->\n",
    "<!--date_updated:sat-16-may-2026-->\n",
    "\n",
    "---"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": null,
   "id": "203355ce",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "from IPython.display import Audio, display\n",
    "\n",
    "import drumscript as ds\n",
    "\n",
    "# Load audio\n",
    "audio_file_path = \"audio/test_track_1.wav\"\n",
    "audio_file = ds.load_audio(audio_file_path)\n",
    "print(\"Audio loaded!\")\n",
    "display(Audio(audio_file_path))"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": null,
   "id": "741a625a",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "\n",
    "# 1. Basic transcription\n",
    "# This outputs XML and PDF files by default\n",
    "basic_transcription = ds.transcribe(\n",
    "    audio_path=audio_file_path,\n",
    "    output_dir='transcription'\n",
    ")\n",
    "\n",
    "print('Transcription complete. Files generated:', basic_transcription)"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "118b0cee",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "---\n",
    "<!--END-->"
   ]
  }
